# Generated Static Site Output

This directory is generated by `python site/build.py`.

`data/` is generated by Generated Public Data Summaries v0 for static validation only; it is not a live API.

`lite/`, `text/`, and `files/` are generated by Lite/Text/Files Seed Surfaces v0 for static compatibility validation; they do not add live search, downloads, snapshots, relay behavior, or native-client runtime.

`demo/` is generated by Static Resolver Demo Snapshots v0 for static fixture-backed resolver examples; it does not add live search, a live API, backend hosting, external observations, or production behavior.

`public_site/` remains the GitHub Pages deployment artifact for Static Site Generation Migration v0.
